#  Announcing the Release of Apache Flink 1.16
October 28, 2022 - Godfrey He (@godfreyhe)
Apache Flink continues to grow at a rapid pace and is one of the most active communities in Apache. Flink 1.16 had over 240 contributors enthusiastica…
